scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace dicekout-frontend && npm run lint --workspace dicekout-catalog-manager
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace dicekout-frontend && npm run test --workspace dicekout-catalog-manager
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace dicekout-frontend && npm run lint --workspace dicekout-catalog-manager && npm run test --workspace dicekout-catalog-manager && npm run build --workspace dicekout-catalog-manager
